transcript.text: Hello!!
Hello?
[Warmly] Thank you for calling Kaya Clinic. This is Priya. How may I help you today?
You called me. What is the reason for the call?
[Warmly] [Empathetically] Hello, am I speaking with Bhavesh? Hi, this is Priya calling from Kaya Clinic. You recently filled out a form on our website. Is this a good time to talk?
Yes.
[Patiently] Could you tell me a little about the concern you'd like to address — is it related to your skin, hair, or something else?
Uh, yes. It is about my hair.

[Warmly] Thank you for sharing, Bhavesh. We offer various hair treatments like hair loss treatment, PRP, and laser hair reduction. Our expert dermatologist will evaluate your concern and create a personalised plan for you.
Oh.
[Patiently] I have your first name as Bhavesh, could I please get your last name for the booking?
Bhagat.
[Warmly] Thank you, Bhavesh Bhagat. Which city are you based in?
Vadodara. My last name is Thak.
My apologies, Bhavesh Thak. Thank you for the correction. [Patiently] We have a branch in Jetalpur, Vadodara. Would that be convenient for you?
Can you, can, can you spell the spelling of my last name?
[Patiently] Certainly. Could you please spell your last name for me?
You tell what you wrote as my last name.
[Patiently] I had noted it as T-H-A-K. Is that correct?
No, no, no. T-A-N-K. That is what my last name is.
[Warmly] Thank you for clarifying. So, it's Bhavesh Tank. I've updated that for you. [Patiently] Now, regarding your appointment, what date works best for you?
Uh...
What about 5 June?
[Warmly] Thank you. And what time of day would be convenient for you on June five — morning, afternoon, or evening?
Late evening.
[Patiently] We book in 30-minute slots. For late evening, would six o'clock or six thirty PM work better for you?
Uh, can you do it at seven o'clock?
[Warmly] Yes, seven o'clock is available. [Patiently] So, that's June five at seven PM. Does that sound right?
Yes, looks good to me.
[Warmly] Perfect. I'd like to let you know, a basic consultation is completely free. If your concern requires a detailed medical evaluation by the doctor, the fee is seven hundred fifty rupees.
[Patiently] What is your email address?
Oh. Uh, so I won't have to pay anything for this first visit, right?
[Patiently] That's right, the basic consultation is free. The fee of seven hundred fifty rupees only applies if a detailed medical evaluation is needed.
How can I know if I need a medical evaluation?
[Patiently] The dermatologist will determine that during your consultation, based on your specific hair concern. They will discuss it with you before any charges apply.
[Warmly] Great. What is your email address?
Oh, okay. That's great.
R369rtaak@gmail.com.
[Patiently] Thank you. Just to confirm, is that R three six nine R T A A K at gmail dot com?
No, no, that is totally wrong. My email address is bhavesh369rtak@gmail.com.
[Patiently] My apologies. Let me confirm that for you: B H A V E S H three six nine R T A K at gmail dot com. Is that correct?
No. No, no. R E A N K.
[Patiently] Thank you...
@gmail.com.
[Warmly] Thank you for clarifying. So, that's B H A V E S H three six nine R E A N K at gmail dot com. Is that correct?
No, no, no. You got it wrong again. It is 3 6 9 R T A N K at the gmail dot com.
[Patiently] Thank you for your patience. Let me try again. Is your email address B H A V E S H three six nine R T A N K at gmail dot com?
Yes, yes. That is correct now.
[Warmly] Wonderful. And what is your Date of Birth?
Is it required?
[Patiently] Yes, it is required to complete your booking.
Why?
[Patiently] It helps...
Why do you need my birthday?
[Patiently] We require your date of birth for our records and to ensure accurate patient identification.
Okay. Then it is 16 February, 2004.
[Warmly] Thank you. What is your six-digit pin code to complete the booking?
Uh, I don't know.
My city is Surat.
Does, does that work?
[Patiently] We had previously confirmed your city as Vadodara. Could you please confirm which city you are currently in?
I am in Surat. I never said about Vadodara.

[Patiently] My apologies for the misunderstanding. You mentioned Vadodara earlier when I asked which city you were based in. [Warmly] Since you are in Surat, we have branches in Vesu and Ghod Dod Road. Which one would be more convenient for you?
Uh, which one would be more closer to me? Can you tell me?
[Patiently] To help me find the closest branch, could you please provide your six-digit pin code?
Uh, actually, I don't know the pin code I currently live at. I am new to here. Uh, I live in Amrili. Can you check it, which one is near to me?
[Patiently] I'm checking for the closest branch in Surat for you. Please bear with me for a moment.
Okay, no problem.
[Patiently] In Surat, we have branches at Vesu and Ghod Dod Road. Which one is most convenient for you?
Can't you tell me?
[Patiently] I can't tell you which one is closer without your pin code. Would you prefer Vesu or Ghod Dod Road?
